chapter_title.en: Chapter on Fasting Upon Sighting the Moon and Breaking the Fast Upon Sighting the Moon

text: 1914 - وَ قَالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «لاَ تُقْبَلُ شَهَادَةُ اَلنِّسَاءِ فِي رُؤْيَةِ اَلْهِلاَلِ إِلاَّ شَهَادَةُ رَجُلَيْنِ عَدْلَيْنِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1914 - Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as), said:
"The testimony of women is not accepted for the sighting of the crescent; only the testimony of two just men is accepted."
